title: Add local Docker resources to verify end-to-end Devpilot project flow
forbidden_scope: Do not edit apps/devpilot-api/src/** production code.
Do not modify apps/devpilot-api/prisma/schema.prisma or run prisma migrations.
Do not create new docker-compose files; only edit docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml.
Do not run `docker compose up` in investigation phase; impl phase may run it under /tmp/codex-tool-runs/svton/local-docker-resources-s031/.
Do not commit or push; the main orchestrator handles that after impl + CR.
Do not stand up Tier B services (gitlab, prometheus, rabbitmq, nginx-site-target) in this slice.
summary: Extend docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml and the staging seed runner so every locally-verifiable Devpilot flow (resource-request lifecycle, resource-pool allocation, backup/restore, ssh-transport server-executor, dockerode inventory, object-storage stand-in, SMTP notification) has a real Docker target on a developer machine. Investigation and plan already produced under docs/todos/2026-07-21-local-docker-resources-*.
deliverables: docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml extended with 7 Tier A services and 5 volumes
apps/devpilot-api/.env.example extended with commented SMTP_* and MINIO_* keys
acceptance: docker compose -f docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml up -d --wait brings all 12 services healthy.
Per-service smoke tests pass: mysql SELECT 1, redis PING, postgres pg_isready, ssh nc :2223, minio /minio/health/live, docker-socket-proxy /version, mailhog nc :1025 and :8025.
MinIO bucket devpilot-test created via the `seed` profile one-shot minio-mc service.

node scripts/devpilot-docker-staging.mjs run exits 0; summary JSON status=passed; matrix lists all 13 entries; observability contains minioStatus=200 and dockerProxyStatus=200; localResources block contains resourceTypeIds, poolIds, serverId, credentialId.
apps/devpilot-api/.env.example documents SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, MAIL_FROM, MINIO_ENDPOINT, MINIO_ACCESS_KEY, MINIO_SECRET_KEY, MINIO_BUCKET (all commented).
docs/devpilot/demo-runbook.md and docs/devpilot/resource-request-minimum-loop.md mention resource-mysql, ssh-server, minio, docker-socket-proxy, mailhog.

verification.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml config > /dev/null && docker compose -f docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml up -d --wait && node scripts/devpilot-docker-staging.mjs run
evidence: summary JSON produced by devpilot-docker-staging.mjs (path printed on stdout)

sequencing.action: Edit docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml: rename mysql->api-mysql, redis->api-redis; add resource mysql/redis, postgres, ssh-server, minio, docker-socket-proxy, mailhog; add volumes block.
Edit scripts/devpilot-docker-staging.mjs: matrix, startApi env, seedLocalResources, observability.
Run minio-mc seed profile to create bucket.
Update apps/devpilot-api/.env.example and the two docs.

risks: lscr.io/linuxserver/openssh-server image pull may be rate-limited; mitigation: alternative ghcr.io/linuxserver/openssh-server tag, or fall back to server_agent transport.
docker-socket-proxy requires host /var/run/docker.sock; mitigation: healthcheck fails fast and seed runner records a warning, not a hard failure.

Renaming mysql service may collide with hardcoded references; mitigation: investigation doc §7.2 locks the resource pool mysql to the legacy container name devpilot-g003-mysql so backup.service.ts:504-563 and command policy regex (devpilot-docker-staging.mjs:152-154) keep matching.
